column5: ईर्  ईर्  [Printed book page 0392-2]  <!!!>ईर्  2 Ā. (इर्ते,<!!!> ईराञ्चके, ऐरिष्ट, ईरितुम्, ईर्ण); also 1 P. (p. p. ईरित) 1 To go, move, shake

column7: Typo – The word praṇītā is missing its final visarga. Because it functions as a predicate adjective modifying the masculine plural subject vayam (we), the grammatically correct form must be praṇītāḥ. This is a common typesetting casualty at the end of printed lines in older editions.
